voiceover_segments.text: Welcome to What People Want from AI — today we analyzed 1,633 real AI job postings from Upwork. Let's get into what the market is telling us right now.
68% of these jobs are integration work. Not building models — connecting Claude, GPT, and n8n to real business workflows. The opportunity is massive.
The sweet spot budget is between $500 and $2,500. Premium projects at $5,000 and above are emerging for full agentic system builds.
Number one: AI Automation and Workflow — 52% of the entire market. n8n pipelines, Make.com integrations, Claude API connections, and email triage.
Category two: Content and AI Creative Tools — 28% of the market. Category three: Business Intelligence and Consulting — the remaining 20%.
Real project: AI Automation for Real Estate using Claude plus Zapier plus n8n — budget $1,200. Whoever landed this is now embedded for monthly maintenance.
A full agentic AI developer role using the Claude API directly — budget $5,000. Claude integrations are commanding premium budgets and that gap is widening.
Three underserved opportunities: Real estate AI automation, recurring retainer work, and Claude API specialists. Subscribe for daily AI market reports.
